prompt: Create a candid, realistic early-2000s family dinner snapshot in a modest Chinese apartment dining room, shot with a compact point-and-shoot camera and direct flash. The image should look slightly unsettling because all faces are anonymized by flat rectangular blur blocks. Show exactly 8 people seated tightly around one large round wooden dining table: 1 child/teen girl on the far left in a pale green hoodie, 1 young man beside her in a navy padded vest, 1 young woman in a pink sweater leaning inward, 1 partially hidden person between the young man and young woman, 1 older man centered at the back in a dark sweater holding chopsticks over a small bowl, 1 older woman to his right in a red patterned cardigan eating with chopsticks, 1 adult man on the far right in a dark jacket, and 1 young child in the lower right wearing a navy-and-white top and holding a bowl. Place exactly 8 opaque rectangular face-blur patches over the faces, in warm beige-brown tones with soft edges, obscuring all facial features while preserving hair and body silhouettes. The table is crowded with a home-cooked meal: include about 12 shared serving plates and bowls of Chinese dishes such as soups, stir-fried greens, fish or meat platters, and mixed vegetables; exactly 10 small rice bowls; exactly 6 white ceramic mugs or cups; exactly 3 dark drink glasses; several pairs of chopsticks; and 1 pink tissue box near the front-left of the table. The room has white walls, a wooden doorframe opening to a small kitchen or windowed utility area in the back, a wooden shelving cabinet on the right filled with jars, bowls, pots, and dishes, and a red vertical wall scroll with a black Chinese character on the left wall. Use harsh flash lighting, mild red-eye-era color balance, visible noise, compressed JPEG texture, slight lens distortion, and an ordinary family-photo composition. Add a white digital camera date stamp in the bottom-right corner reading 2006.02.06. Keep the image in a 4:3 landscape aspect ratio, with no artistic stylization, no cinematic lighting, no modern smartphone look, and no readable text other than the date stamp and the wall scroll character.
